'''chatongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacator|vacator]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-t-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacator|vacator]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chatongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chætengeth|chætengeth]] || [[word:chætengej|chætengej]] || [[word:chætengesh|chætengesh]] || [[word:chætenge|chætenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chatotongoth|chatotongoth]] || [[word:chatotongoj|chatotongoj]] || [[word:chatotongosh|chatotongosh]] || [[word:chatotongo|chatotongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chatongoth|chatongoth]] || [[word:chatongoj|chatongoj]] || [[word:chatongosh|chatongosh]] || [[word:chatongo|chatongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chatofngoth|chatofngoth]] || [[word:chatofngoj|chatofngoj]] || [[word:chatofngosh|chatofngosh]] || [[word:chatofngof|chatofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chatongotho|chatongotho]] || [[word:chatongojo|chatongojo]] || [[word:chatongosho|chatongosho]] || [[word:chatongoko|chatongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chatongoth|chatongoth]] || [[word:chatongoj|chatongoj]] || [[word:chatongosh|chatongosh]] || [[word:chatongo|chatongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chatongothol|chatongothol]] || [[word:chatongojol|chatongojol]] || [[word:chatongoshol|chatongoshol]] || [[word:chatongokol|chatongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chatongothotho|chatongothotho]] || [[word:chatongojojo|chatongojojo]] || [[word:chatongoshosho|chatongoshosho]] || [[word:chatongoko|chatongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chatongothon|chatongothon]] || [[word:chatongojon|chatongojon]] || [[word:chatongoshon|chatongoshon]] || [[word:chatongokon|chatongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chatongothoro|chatongothoro]] || [[word:chatongojoro|chatongojoro]] || [[word:chatongoshoro|chatongoshoro]] || [[word:chatongokoro|chatongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
